transcript.text:
Polar bears are representative animals of the Arctic Circle
These bears fight and compete against other bears every day
[Polar Bear vs Panda] The hungry competitors fight over salmon
It is a world where the smarter animals survive at the end
[Clever Tzu-panda] The losers have no choice but to watch the winner eat
[What's going on here?]
Welcome
This is half a salmon which weighs 2kg
I ordered it from Norayngjin Fisheries Wholesale Market
It got delivered today
[Norayngjin..?] [Weren't you at the North Pole?]
Wait, no I'm at the North Pole
There was a polar bear over there eating this salmon And I took the other half
This is the other half
[Chat: Why's the panda in the North Pole?] Yes, I'm a panda
I'm here to hang out

Bon appetit
This is the flying fish roe (tobiko) And this is the salmon roe
The salmon roe might be a little too fishy for me to eat
Let's try it though
I need to cut this up, but
I want to try it as a whole first
It's really big, right?
It's 2kg
1 more bite
With soy sauce
I can't dip it How do I do this?
This tastes so good as a whole
It's really delicious I'm going to cut some up
[Chat: Salmon-eating-panda] I'm a panda but I got sick of eating bamboo sticks
So I'm here for some meat
The polar bear did a good job skinning this

It's really tasty
Let's rub some soy sauce on here
[Chat: Isn't it too oily?] Oily?
Not at all Let's eat the roe
Flying fish roe and salmon roe here
The belly fat is so yummy
So good
Should I eat the tail first?
The tail isn't that great compared to the body, right?
The tail has no marblings and is a little too tough to chew
It's not that great
This one is too tough I can't cut it off
I think the bears are fighting in the back
Whatever
[Reality]
I have to put on a poker face

Let's try the salmon roe
Aren't these really fishy?
It's salty!
I'll eat the tail first
Soy sauce
Chojang sauce when it starts to become heavy (Red chili pepper paste with vinegar)
This will be eaten pretty quickly
Has 2kg been always this small?
Dip in soy sauce
Flying fish roe with salmon
Not oily at all
This one doesn't have too much marbling There's blood here too
But it's still not fishy
Let's make a sashimi
Idk how to do it
[Chat: Let's ask the polar bear] Ask him?

Hey..
How do you do it? Like this?
This isn't sashimi These are just cubes
I shouldn't have cut it
This is like the radish cube kimchi
It's so big
[Chat: Polar bear = coca cola]
I wish I had some coca cola
It's a bit oily, but it's very soft
[Chat: The polar bear is asking for some]
No!
It's really big
It's very thick here in the middle
I'm cold
It's too cold here
So cold!

Really big
Look at the thickness
I'm craving some wasabi now
For the very first time
Do you guys know that this was a trend a while back
I was going to make salmon noodles, but I'm too lazy Let's just eat it
She has found something
She has developed a new strategy
It's a food that provides a week's worth of calories
She eats it quickly
It's a little too oily now
[Chat: Where are you? You seem so cold]
Where am I?
This is the North Pole
[Chat: The acting award goes to...] I'm not acting, it's actually really cold here
It's cold here

I'm not going to eat this
It's too cold
Also too oily
I'm going to share this with the polar bears
They seem very hungry
I will give this to them
And I will make some Ramyun noodles
This might be too much water
It might be bland
Maybe not?
I better cook it longer
[Chat: That's the Han River]
It's done
Not a Han River It's perfect
It's because I only have 2 packs of Ramyun left
Raw egg should be tasty in here

Eating Ramyun noodles in the North Pole is nice
Bon appetit
Yum
The salmon didn't even fill me up at all
I'm still hungry
[Chat: What kind of Ramyun is it?] It's Poo Ramyun (Shin Ramyun)
[Chat: It's cold. Give some soup to the bears]
I can give them some salmon, but not the Ramyun
I'm going to eat more Ramyun when I get home
[Chat: The pot is flicking us off..]
Is it giving you the finger?
I'll turn it like this then
This should be okay
[Chat: It's still flicking us off!]
How am I supposed to drink it then?
Like this?

It's filtering out the vegetables!
That was a nice meal
I had some Ramyun here in the North Pole
It's a little embarrassing
Where am I?
The North Pole? Alaska?
[The Studio]
Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com
